sabrahmacārin (2. sa + bra˚) m. (geistlicher) Mitschüler  P. 6,3,86  nebst  Vārtt.   VOP. 6,97 .  AK. 2,7,11 .  H. 80 .  ĀŚV. GṚHY. 4,4,26 .  GOBH. 3,3,18 .  ŚĀṄKH. GṚHY. 4,17 .  M. 5,71 .  YĀJÑ. 2,135 .  KĀM. NĪTIS. 2,23 .  KATHĀS. 4,97 . 70,19  [Page7-0671] (sabra˚ zu lesen). 104,24 . Inschr. in  Journ. of the Am. Or. S. 6,539,13 . f. ˚cāriṇī  KATHĀS. 29,52 . gatiṃ garutmato dṛṣṭvā vegasabrahmacāriṇīm so v. a. wetteifernd 18,89 .
— Vgl. sābrahmacāriṇa.

results.rendered_html:
sabrahmacārin m.
1 A fellow-student, one going through the same studies and observing the same austerities.
2 A fellow-sufferer, sympathiser; duḥkhasabrahmacāriṇī taralikā kva gatā  K. ; he vyasanasabrahmacārin yadi na guhyaṃ tataḥ śrotumicchāmi  Mu. 6. 
3 (Hence) An equal, of the same kind;  Vb. 1. 39.
